title: Ruby Hall Clinic is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Ruby Hall Clinic is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Ruby Hall Clinic, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Howrah operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Ruby Hall Clinic:
Ruby Hall Clinic is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ruby Hall Clinic!
